_doc: Golden cases for the iOS hand-written HTTP/1.1 chunked-transfer decoder (audit D3c-08 / HttpChunked.decode). inputHex is the raw chunked body on the wire; expect is the decoded payload as a UTF-8 string. The Android fetcher delegates chunk decoding to OkHttp, so only the iOS host runner (HttpChunkedGoldenCheck) asserts this — it guards the error-prone hand-written path against regressions. Lenient: a malformed length or truncated chunk stops decoding and returns what was read so far.
